headline: Honeywell NHL Arena Deal Highlights Smart Infrastructure And Valuation Opportunity
summary: Honeywell International (NasdaqGS:HON) has entered a multi-year global partnership with the NHL to serve as the league’s Official Building Automation and Energy Management Partner. The agreement focuses on deploying AI-enabled building automation and energy management solutions across professional and community hockey arenas in North America. The partnership targets improved energy efficiency, operational performance, and fan experience in rinks and arenas. For investors tracking Honeywell...

headline: Dell Technologies Stock Hits 52-Week High - Here's Why
summary: Dell hits a 52-week high as analysts boost price targets ahead of Q1 earnings, citing "parabolic" AI infrastructure demand.
